images.caption: Figure 1:AUROC of correctness prediction across six dataset–model cells and six confidence signals (n=1000n{=}1000per cell).(a)Grouped bars show AUROC per cell; the dashed line marks chance performance.(b)The same values are shown as a heatmap.ϕfirst\phi_{\mathrm{first}}achieves the highest AUROC in five of six cells and is within0.0020.002AUROC of the strongest method in the remaining cell, while requiring only a single greedy decode.
